title: Test wrapup with skills and parallel groups
notes: 2026-04-06 16:46 - Task afu: Replaced WrapupAgentStep with two methods (WrapupAgentStepStarted/Completed). The old method combined both states; now started prints '[i/n] title...' and completed prints '[i/n] title — status (duration)' with em-dash separator. Board events are wrapup_agent_step_started and wrapup_agent_step_completed. Duration is truncated to milliseconds for terminal display.
